name: Chocolate Birthday Cake
description: Rich dark chocolate sponge with chocolate buttercream and ganache drip. Serves 10-12.

name: Vanilla Birthday Cake
description: Classic vanilla sponge with vanilla buttercream and fresh berry topping. Serves 10-12.

description: Zesty lemon sponge with lemon syrup glaze and candied lemon slices. Serves 8-10.

name: Custom Wedding Tier
description: Two-tier wedding cake, fully customised. Consultation required. Price from £120.
